name: Torture Chambers
effect: Increase production of Royal Castles/Evil Fortresses/Iron Strongholds (by alignment) based on assistants owned.

name: Infernal Magic
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on Hell Portals built.
formula: +(3 + 1.5 * x^0.5), where x = Hell Portals built

name: Burning Legion
effect: Gain assistants based on the highest amount of Hell Portals built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(6 + 1.5 * x^0.65), where x = highest Hell Portals this Reincarnation

name: Lava Pits
effect: Increase base production of Evil Fortresses by +900,000 and Hell Portals by +8,800,000.

name: Demon Overseers
effect: Increase production of the three highest building tiers based on Trophies unlocked.

name: Demonic Presence
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on Evil spells cast this Reincarnation.
formula: +(40 + 4 * ln(1+x)^4), where x = Evil spells cast this Reincarnation

name: Devil Tyrant
effect: Increase production of the three highest building tiers based on Evil time this Reincarnation. Those tiers also count 100% more.
formula: (1.5 * x^0.5)%, where x = Evil time this Reincarnation

name: Evil Conquerors
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Hell Portals built this Reincarnation.
formula: (4 * x^0.8)%, where x = highest Hell Portals this Reincarnation

name: Very Bad Guys
effect: Increase production of Heaven's Gate/Hell Portals/Ancient Pyramid (by alignment) based on Hellfire Blast activity time this Reincarnation.
formula: (35 + 0.7 * x^0.7)%, where x = Hellfire Blast activity time this Reincarnation

name: Abyssal Furnace
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Burning Abysses this Reincarnation. Higher tiers get better bonuses.
formula: (0.35 * T^2 * x^0.7)%, T = building tier, x = highest Burning Abysses this Reincarnation

name: Demonic Fury
effect: Multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance based on the minimum of Evil and Chaos time this Reincarnation.
formula: (25 + 0.25 * min(x,y)^0.75)%, x = Evil time, y = Chaos time this Reincarnation

name: Devastation
effect: Increase production of the three highest building tiers based on Mana Regeneration.
